title: World of Alice   Parts of the House
description: World of Alice - Parts of the House World of Alice - Parts of the House is an educational game developed for children where they will learn what the different parts of the house are and their names in a fun way using their cell phone, tablet or computer. Excellent educational resource. In Alices world, learning is fun.
instructions: Click on the image corresponding to your name
tags: free html5 games for your website
